case_title: INTERINSURANCE EXCHANGE OF THE AUTOMOBILE CLUB VS. BRIAN PAWLUS et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CYNTHIA WINTER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-10-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-25-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-10-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
